questions.question: What two types of async dependencies does <Suspense> work with?
options: defineAsyncComponent and components with async setup()
Pinia store actions and Vue Router navigation guards

questions.question: What does the timeout prop on <Suspense> control?
options: How long to wait before showing an error state
The maximum time allowed for async setup to resolve
How long the old resolved content stays visible before the fallback reappears on re-trigger
The delay before the first render attempt
